fields.label: View
fields.rationale: Form is the canonical place for client logic (field show/hide, set_value, custom buttons). List applies to the list view; Report applies to report builder pages.

fields.label: Script body
fields.rationale: Browser-side JS. Use frappe.ui.form.on with the DocType name, then handler functions like refresh, <fieldname> (on change), validate, after_save. Read via frm.doc.<field>, mutate via frm.set_value. Avoid jQuery selectors against Desk chrome.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.rationale: Default to enabled. Use 0 for staging-only scripts.
